Agentic Services  ›  Finances

Finances

Managed by Adelphos · Monthly subscription

An agent that runs your quotations, invoicing, forecasting and reconciliation — connected to your live project data.

Most practices lose hours every week to financial admin. We replace that loop with an agent connected to your accounting system, project tracker, and bank feed — with a human service team checking every issue.

Talk to us about deploying Finances → See how it works
DaysDSO drops from weeks to days
Hoursquote turnaround, not days
Real-timecash forecast you actually trust
Weeklydigest covers everything you need to know

Description

We connect the Adelphos finance agent to your accounting system (Xero, QuickBooks, Sage), your project tracker and your bank feed, and pair it with a human service team based in our office.

Day-to-day, the agent drafts client quotes from project briefs and your rate card (typically within hours of a brief landing rather than days); raises invoices automatically the moment a project milestone is hit; reconciles every bank transaction against open invoices and flags mismatches; chases overdue payments with escalating reminders signed off by our service team; and produces a continuously-updated cash forecast from your live pipeline, work-in-progress and receivables.

Our team reviews every quote and invoice before it goes to a client, handles client payment queries, and sends you a weekly digest of everything that's moved. For a typical 20–30 person engineering practice this frees up 1 to 2 days a week of principal-level time previously spent on finance admin, and typically pulls debtor days down from 60+ to under 30 within the first quarter.

Adelphos Finances will be the only finance service for engineering practices where an active agent does the work and a human team handles every client conversation — billed on outcomes, not seats.

The shift

What running this part of the business looks like today, versus with Finances.

Before

Quotes drafted from scratch. Invoices raised days after the milestone. Reconciliation done in monthly batches. Forecasts that age out by the time you read them.

After Finances

Quotes drafted automatically from the brief and your rate card. Invoices raised the day the milestone hits. Reconciliation runs continuously. Forecasts update with every change.

What we offer

  • Quotation agent — drafts client quotes from project briefs, your rate card, and similar past jobs
  • Invoicing agent — raises and chases invoices against live project milestones
  • Reconciliation agent — matches bank transactions to invoices, flags mismatches
  • Forecasting agent — projects monthly cash from current pipeline + WIP + receivables
  • Human service team — reviews every issued document, handles client conversations, gives you a weekly summary

How it becomes agentic

We don't drop a tool on your desk and walk away. We move you up an automation maturity ladder over weeks, not years, with a human on every step until the agent has earned autonomy.

1. Discovery — we map your existing process (who does what, in which tool, when).
2. Connect — we wire the agent into your accounting system, project tracker, and bank feed.
3. Shadow run — agent drafts everything for two weeks; you review every output before issue.
4. Co-pilot — agent issues low-risk items automatically (chasers, reminders); humans approve invoices.
5. Auto with audit — agent runs the loop; you review the weekly digest. Any decision is reversible in one click.

Features

Everything Finances ships with as a managed service. Each item is a concrete capability — no marketing fluff.

  • Quotation drafting Drafts client quotes from project briefs + your rate card + similar past jobs.
  • Auto-invoicing Raises invoices the moment a project milestone is hit.
  • Bank-feed reconciliation Matches every bank transaction to open invoices; flags mismatches.
  • Escalating debtor chasers Reminders sent on a schedule, signed off by our service team.
  • Live cash forecast Continuously updated from pipeline + WIP + receivables.
  • Weekly digest Principal-level summary of every meaningful financial movement.
  • Human service team review Every quote and invoice reviewed before it leaves to a client.
  • Xero / QuickBooks / Sage Connects to your existing accounting system; no migration.
  • Project tracker integration Hooks into your project management tool to know when milestones hit.
  • Audit-ready ledger Every action logged; full audit trail at year-end.

How we work together

Engagement model

Monthly subscription + outcome-based bonus on collected receivables

Related

Agentic service Project Management Project management is mostly admin: who's doing what, what's overdue, where's the data, what changed. We deploy an agent that handles the admin and a managed PM service to handle the judgement calls. App Revit Copilot Talk to Revit. Frequently asked questions

Quick answers AI engines (and humans) can pull from.

What is Finances?

Most practices lose hours every week to financial admin. We replace that loop with an agent connected to your accounting system, project tracker, and bank feed — with a human service team checking every issue.

What does Finances do?

We connect the Adelphos finance agent to your accounting system (Xero, QuickBooks, Sage), your project tracker and your bank feed, and pair it with a human service team based in our office.

How is Finances different from the manual workflow?

Without Finances: Quotes drafted from scratch. Invoices raised days after the milestone. Reconciliation done in monthly batches. Forecasts that age out by the time you read them. With Finances: Quotes drafted automatically from the brief and your rate card. Invoices raised the day the milestone hits. Reconciliation runs continuously. Forecasts update with every change.

How much time does Finances save?

Headline outcomes for Finances: Days (DSO drops from weeks to days); Hours (quote turnaround, not days); Real-time (cash forecast you actually trust); Weekly (digest covers everything you need to know).

What's the engagement model for Finances?

Monthly subscription + outcome-based bonus on collected receivables

Ready to hand over the admin?
